organic.title: Placements 2024-25 - SRM Institute of Science and Technology
organic.snippet: SRM Placements 2024-25: Total offers 6,142 across 1,247 companies visited. Highest CTC ₹52 LPA (Microsoft). Average CTC ₹6.8 LPA. Software-track placement %: 86%. Top recruiters: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture, Razorpay, Freshworks, Microsoft, Oracle, ZS Associates.
